name: 5" Gold Plastic Fillable Easter Egg - Spritz™
description: Bring easter Joy to your home with Plastic Eggs 5" Gold Easter Egg - Spritz™. With a golden glazed cover on the egg, it’s the perfect addition to your easter basket decorations. Ideal for an indoor environment, this Easter egg from Spritz can be mixed and matched with other easter décor to liven up your festive ambiance.
